block_01: Bitcoin appears to be going for gold; golden cross that is.
block_02: On the 26th March 2019 BTC rewarded it’s followers a “Golden Cross”. The cross is comprised of a 50 SMA (simple moving average) & a 200 SMA; the cross appears on a chart when an asset’s short-term moving average (50 SMA) crosses above its long-term moving average (200 SMA)
block_03: Using a candle duration of “1 Day” we can clearly see the shift up, in regards to the asset’s price movement & trading volume. The cross, could represent the first glimmer of hope for HODLERS as BTC has been on a steady Bear Cycle, since we witnessed a Death Cross on the 1st April 2018.
block_04: Needless to say, crypto enthusiasts around the world are attentively waiting to see if this could be the beginning of a new Bullish Rally.
block_05: In numbers: over the past four “Bear Runs” BTC & other ALTCOINS experienced on average, just under a 70% fall; whereas the “Bull Runs” which followed, injected over 600% growth. Presently, the market is drawing close to an approximate drop of 66.5%, in this current Bear Cycle.
block_06: Since the Golden Cross, BTC has almost doubled in price, going from the 5K range to over 8K in a number of weeks. Trading Volume has also increased showing a growing interest in BTC.
